center.name: 苏拉威西岛
center.summary: 苏拉威西岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、蓝胸鹑、白喉林鸽等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: During winter they migrate to northern Australia, New Guinea, Java, Sulawesi and southern Borneo.Geering, A., Agnew, L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Sulawesi and the Sangir Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits subtropical and tropical moist lowland and montane forests of Sulawesi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: celebensis at Manado, Indonesia | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | authority = (Linnaeus, 1766) | synonyms = *Rallus torquatus *Hypotaenidia torquata }} The barred rail (Gallirallus torquatus) is a species of rail found across the Philippines, Sulawesi (Indonesia) and Salawati (western New Guinea)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Indonesia, it is found in Java, Lesser Sunda Islands and Sulawesi, where it inhabits the lowland and hill forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The parrot inhabits forests, forest edges, swamps, riverine forest, bamboo patches, mangrove wooded gardens, and coconut groves, as well as plantations. Throughout its range, Sulawesi is the only area where more than one Loriculus species is found because intraspecific competition usually prevents other closely related species from overlapping

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Sulawesi and the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird occurs in south-eastern Borneo, the southern Philippines, Sulawesi, Moluccas, Lesser Sunda Islands, north and south-east New Guinea, New Britain (Lake Lalili), and northern and eastern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Sulawesi and nearby smaller islands in Indonesia, where it occurs in forest, secondary growth and tall mangrove

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Loriculus exilis is mainly endemic to Sulawesi island in Indonesia, but can also be found on many small surrounding islands such as Buton, Kabaena, and Wawonii. Although previously thought to occur only in preserved, or primary lowland forest, the species has shown some tolerance to habitat degradation. This said, it inhabits a wide range of forested areas; primary and secondary lowland and hill forests, as well as mangroves and forest edge habitats. It has been said to fly or perch anywhere from sea level up to 1,000 meters, but recent records extend its elevation range to 1,320 m in the Mekongga Mountains.{{Cite journal |last1=Berryman |first1=Alex J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sahul sunbird is a resident species from Sulawesi and the Maluku Islands to New Guinea, the Aru Islands, the Bismarck Archipelago, northern Solomon Islands and northeastern Australia. It is found in various habitats including mangroves, forest edge, open scrub as well as parks and gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The emerald dove has a large range in Indonesia and Melanesia, stretching from Sulawesi and Taliabu east through most of lowland New Guinea and its satellite islands to the Admiralty Islands, Bismarck Archipelago, and Solomon Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Both sexes are similar.thumb|alt=A pair of Sulawesi ground doves on a branch in Louisville Zoo, USA.|A pair of Sulawesi ground doves in Louisville Zoo, USA. An Indonesian endemic, this elusive species is distributed in primary rainforests of Sulawesi in Wallacea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Sulawesi hawk-eagle is distributed in rainforests of Sulawesi and its satellite islands of Buton, Muna, Banggai and Sula Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Cittura cyanotis |volume=2016 |article-number=e.T22726889A94934825 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T22726889A94934825.en |access-date=19 November 2021}} | image = Sulawesi Lilac Kingfisher 0A2A3251.jpg | image_caption = male | image2 = Sulawesi Lilac Kingfisher (female) 0A2A6535.jpg | image2_caption = female | taxon = Cittura cyanotis | authority = (Temminck, 1824) }} right|thumb|Cittura cyanotis at Bintauna The Sulawesi lilac kingfisher (Cittura cyanotis) is a species of kingfisher in the genus Cittura, found in the lowlands of the Indonesia island of Sulawesi and Lembeh

birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs in Sulawesi, Taliabu, Selayar and Tanah Jampea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs in Sulawesi, Manterawu, and Togian Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: right|thumb|Male at Burgers' Zoo, Netherlands Native to Australasia, the superb fruit dove lives in the rainforests of New Guinea, Australia, Solomon Islands, the Philippines and Sulawesi of Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia where it is found in Sulawesi's northern peninsula and the Togian Islands in the Gulf of Tomini

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It winters in the Philippines, Borneo and Sulawesi and in small numbers in China, Hong Kong, South Korea, Malaysia, Taiwan and the U.S.A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Milky stork in Borneo The milky stork's range is restricted to Southeast Asia, where it is widely but patchily distributed. It occurs in Sumatra (its global stronghold), Java, Sulawesi, eastern Malaysia, Cambodia, southern Vietnam (where it probably largely recolonised after the war of 1963–75), Bali, Sumbawa, Lombok and Buton. It historically occurred in southern Thailand,Byers O, Brouwer K, Coulter M, Seal US

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sulawesi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-crested cockatoo is found in wooded and cultivated areas of East Timor and Indonesia's islands of Sulawesi and the Lesser Sundas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can now be found in central Thailand, Laos, Borneo, Sulawesi, Hawaii (introduced in 1922), Tahiti (1950), New Caledonia, the Seychelles, the Chagos Archipelago (1960), Mauritius (before 1768), Réunion, and Saint Helena

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the Philippines, Indonesia after the Wallace Line (except Sulawesi), Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands, Vanuatu, New Caledonia, Fiji, and Samoa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in eastern Java, southern Sulawesi, Bali and on the Lesser Sunda Islands
